thesis: Large multi-agent systems coordinate to optimal effect when they become proof-governed sovereign institutions.
claimBoundary: Browser-local public demonstration only. No user data, no forms, no uploads, no wallet, no payment, no value movement, no live settlement, no live staking, no escrow, no claim of achieved AGI or ASI.
coordinationObjective: Maximize verified work while minimizing compute cost, safety risk, coordination overhead, and unknown externality.
doctrine: A model can answer. An agent can act. An institution must prove.
Ascension is not many agents. Ascension is learned coordination under proof.
Maximum useful effect is verified work under bounded risk, low waste, recoverable failure, and compounding memory.
No ProofBundle, no settlement. No replay, no settlement. No authority, no autonomy.

agents.name: Coordinator
agents.role: routes work, budgets effort, stops waste

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: packages the deliverable and proof packet

agents.name: Validator
agents.role: checks proof, baseline, and replay path

agents.name: Chronicle
agents.role: records accepted experience for future work

stages.label: Mission
stages.description: A bounded objective becomes a signed mission contract.

stages.label: Constellation
stages.description: GoalOS selects role contracts, access rules, budgets, validators, and stop conditions.

stages.label: Work
stages.description: Agents execute bounded work under scope, cost, and risk limits.

stages.label: Proof
stages.description: The run emits hashes, claims matrix, proof packets, cost ledger, and risk ledger.

stages.label: Validation
stages.description: Validators check evidence, contradictions, replay, baseline, and claim boundary.

stages.label: Chronicle
stages.description: Accepted experience is written as institutional memory.

stages.label: Capability
stages.description: Only proof-accepted work becomes reusable capability.

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Evaluate whether an AI-generated research brief is ready for institutional use.

scenarios.label: Automation delivery review
scenarios.objective: Determine whether a workflow automation meets stated acceptance criteria.

scenarios.label: Grant milestone proof
scenarios.objective: Package milestone evidence into a decision-ready docket.

scenarios.label: Vendor proof review
scenarios.objective: Review a vendor AI deliverable against claims, evidence, risk, and replay path.
